title: Tracking column changes
excerpt: Is there any way to find out when/who added or deleted a column? It does not seem to show up in the board activity tracking section

posts.author: Jessie_Plumpton (Jessie)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there any way to find out when/who added or deleted a column? It does not seem to show up in the board activity tracking section

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Jessie_Plumpton !

You actually can see who/when a column was created, edited and deleted.

image841×448 33 KB

As you can see, we know that I created a Text Column, renamed it to Test, and then deleted it.

You can also use the filter option if you are looking for something specific.

Hope this helps!
Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com

posts.author: Jessie_Plumpton (Jessie)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, This actually links to the fact that if this is done at a sub item level it does not show up in the main activity log.
